---
title: "JSC370 Final Project"
description: "Project summary, links, and interactive visualizations."
---

## Overview

_One-paragraph summary of the project: the topic, the dataset, and the research question. Fill in later._

## Project at a glance

- **Question:** _TBD — the main question(s) the project answers._
- **Data:** _TBD — source, size, time range._
- **Methods:** _TBD — EDA + course-covered modeling method (XGBoost / RF / GAM / LDA)._
- **Key finding:** _TBD — one-sentence takeaway._

## Navigate the site

- [About the project](about.qmd)
- [Read the full report](report.qmd)
- [Interactive visualizations](viz.qmd)

## Downloads & links

- [Download the PDF report](report.pdf)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/EricWcr7/JSC370-2026S-Final-Project)
